rule_metadata.name: BITSInject
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'BITSInject' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule BITSInject
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'BITSInject' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "BITSInject"
		rule_category = "signature_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /Behavior\:Win32\/BitsInject\.A\!attk/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
